briefdescription.para: This function waits for the clock wizard to lock.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the clock wizard configuration

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Clock Wizard IP for video and audio clocks.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the Display Controller Subsystem.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure

briefdescription.para: This function sets up interrupt handlers for DMA interrupts.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure

briefdescription.para: This function initializes all platform blocks (clocks, DC, DP, interrupts)

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the application configuration structure

briefdescription.para: This file contains platform initialization functions.
